# Djok

> CS2 reaction time analysis tool. Decomposes every duel from a real FACEIT demo into three reaction phases — T0→T1 (perception, time from enemy first geometrically visible to aim-start), T1→T2 (aim, aim-start to first hit), and crosshair angle at T0 (pre-aim accuracy in degrees). Each metric is tier-classified against fixed pro ceilings (donk-class — Elite / Good / Average / Work needed) and paired with one drill prescription per worst metric.

Djok is for FACEIT level 8–10 CS2 players who train aim daily but cannot tell whether they lose duels because they were slow to perceive, slow to aim, or pre-aimed wrong. Aim trainers like Aim Lab and KovaaK's drill bot reaction; Leetify reports an aggregated rating. Djok decomposes the actual phases on the actual demo where the duel was lost.

## Method

- T0 = first geometric visibility — BVH+AABB ray cast to 8 corners of enemy bounding box on the map's `.tri` mesh (awpy `VisibilityChecker`), with +64u eye height for player and enemy
- T1 = aim-start — viewangle second-derivative spike from `usercmd_viewangle` ticks
- T2 = first hit — `player_hurt` event tick from demo
- Smoke suppression — sphere intersection (r≈144u) against active smokes
- Flash suppression — `player_blind` event windows skipped
- Tickrate 64 (CS2 standard), ms_per_tick = 15.625ms
- Code stays private; methodology and dataset are public

## Pricing

- **Free tier card**: $0 — 1 demo per submission, worst-metric callout, one drill prescription
- **Full report**: $5 — up to 20 demos per order, drill prescription per metric, peek/hold split, crosshair angle, side-by-side pro benchmarks (12 pros across Spirit + FaZe), downloadable HTML report (offline, brand-styled, shareable)

## Pro reference data

Twelve pros across Team Spirit and FaZe, N≥142 peek trials each. Peek engagements only, clean ≤2000ms. Sorted by T0→T1 ASC:

| Player | Team | n peek | T0→T1 median | T1→T2 median | Crosshair@T0 median |
|-|-|-|-|-|-|
| donk | Spirit | 956 | 172ms | 344ms | 5.2° |
| broky | FaZe | 153 | 172ms | 422ms | 6.4° |
| frozen | FaZe | 335 | 188ms | 266ms | 4.4° |
| sh1ro | Spirit | 180 | 188ms | 273ms | 4.9° |
| karrigan | FaZe | 559 | 203ms | 375ms | 5.8° |
| tN1R | Spirit | 324 | 203ms | 297ms | 4.8° |
| twistzz | FaZe | 301 | 203ms | 250ms | 5.3° |
| jcobbb | FaZe | 272 | 203ms | 281ms | 5.2° |
| zweih | Spirit | 192 | 219ms | 281ms | 4.8° |
| chopper | Spirit | 142 | 219ms | 273ms | 4.3° |
| zont1x | Spirit | 276 | 234ms | 297ms | 5.2° |
| magixx | Spirit | 168 | 234ms | 258ms | 4.7° |

- Database state (2026-05-12): 9027 engagements analyzed across 154 distinct players, 143 demos (Spirit 86 + FaZe 57)

## Workflow

1. Player submits a `.dem` file via Tally form on landing page (collects SteamID + Telegram contact)
2. Manual analysis pipeline runs on submitter's machine (Streamlit + custom Python — `ddm_analyzer.py`, `t0_detector.py`, `interpretation.py`, `report_generator.py`)
3. `.html` report delivered via Telegram DM within 48h
4. Free tier returns 1 worst-metric callout + 1 drill prescription; paid tier returns full per-metric tiers + drill set + peek/hold split + crosshair angle + pro benchmarks

## Public surface

- Landing: https://djok.din02winchester25.workers.dev/
- Sample report: https://djok.din02winchester25.workers.dev/sample-report.html
- Submit form: https://tally.so/r/KYDaXV (linked from landing CTA)
- Payment (paid tier): Boosty (https://boosty.to/leodikadyrov) for RU + Ko-fi (https://ko-fi.com/leodikadyrov) for international

## What Djok is NOT

- Not an aim trainer (no synthetic drills, no bots, no browser RT tests)
- Not a Leetify-style aggregator (no single-number "Aim Rating" — Djok ships per-phase decomposition)
- Not real-time / on-server (manual demo upload, 48h delivery)
- Not a coaching service (data + drill prescription only — no live coaching, no team analysis yet)

- Telegram DM via landing CTA / Tally form
